Title: Opportunity Development
Description: Sales create the opprtunity and notifies the offer manager

Title: Offer Calculation Requested
Description: Engineering receives a demand for creating an offer calculation

Title: Analyse Request
Description: check if request is meeting minimum information requirements for forwarding the activity (Transformer drawings, nameplate, technical specification or/and any other relevant information).

Title: Offer Calculation Documentation Requested
Description: Engineering needs more information about the scope to be able to develop the offer calculation

Title: Offer Calculation Documentation Released
Description: Costumer or/and Local Engineering releases the documentation requested

Title: Offer Calculation Released
Description: Engineering releases the documentation necessary for the offer team to finish the proposal

Title: Offer Calculation Revision Requested
Description: Sales or the offer manager asks engineering to modify the offer calculation

Title: Offer Rejected
Description: The Final Offer is rejected by the customer

Title: Offer Approved
Description: The Final Offer is approved and enters the queue for Handover

Title: Order Handover
Description: Offer and Order managers hands the offer proposal to the Project Manager and Engineering Manager

Title: Order Created
Description: Project Manager creates the Order Structure in the systems

Title: Work Order Released
Description: A list with all main project items for customer approval and manufacturing

Title: Project Planning Created
Description: A detailed activity and task roadmap based on the Work Order

Title: Approval Documentation Released
Description: Drawings, Instructions, Procedures that needs customer approval before moving on with the project

Title: Approval Documentation Revision Requested
Description: Customer asks for clarifications or changes in the project or documentation sent

Title: Approval Documentation Approved
Description: Customer approves the project and the documentation sent

Title: Critical Material List Released
Description: List of materials with high delivery time deadlines

Title: Manufacturing Documentation Released
Description: Drawings, instruction, procedures necessary to produce the scope

Title: Manufacturing Documentation Revision Request
Description: External or Internal Suppliers can ask for revisions about documentation errors or manufacturing improvements

Title: Project Documentation Request
Description: Information needed for developing the project scope

Title: Project Documentation Released
Description: Documentation that supports project development (eg: Technical Specifications, Original Drawings, etc)

Title: BOM Released
Description: Build Of Material list prepared to be inserted in the system

Title: BOM Revision Requested
Description: Material code update review requested from purchase department

Title: Project Released
Description: Project is released for production or delivered to internal customers

Title: Project Inspection Scope Request
Description: If equipment is repaired at a location remote from the design engineering team, an inspection scope is required to capture all necessary information

Title: Project Inspection Scope Released
Description: The inspection scope is issued to the local engineering leader where the transformer is located

Title: Project Inspection Scope Report Released
Description: The local engineering team sends back the inspection report so that the designers can develop the project

Title: Inspection Scope Released
Description: Equipment and accessories inspections as well as tests necessaries to develop technical scope, project and studies

Title: Inspection Report Released
Description: Field Service engineering develop report accordingly with the scope

Title: FIA Requested
Description: Finding investigation Abalysis requested by the sales or offer manager

Title: FIA Report Released
Description: Findings investigation Analysis Report
